caption: The video shows a player interacting with the FIFA Ultimate Team (FUT) mode, specifically focusing on the upgrades section for the player Troy Polamalu, who has an overall rating of 95. The screen displays options for adding training to unlock team chemistry and ability slots, with a refund option available. The player appears excited and is likely discussing or reacting to the potential upgrades for Polamalu's card. The interface also shows various attributes and positions that can be customized, along with the player's current in-game currency and level. The festive background suggests it might be around the holiday season.
